overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit urban environment. The player navigates streets, concrete staircases, an elevated overpass, and a covered parking garage in a dystopian industrial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with overpass and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy street toward a concrete staircase on the right

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera on the left side heading in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall dual-lamp street lights illuminating the foggy street with warm orange light
tall palm trees lining the street visible through the haze
large concrete wall structure of an elevated highway or overpass
traffic signal showing red light at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy Night City street illuminated by tall sodium street lights. The player walks forward on asphalt toward a concrete overpass structure, passing a pedestrian on the left. Palm trees are visible through the haze, and a red traffic light glows in the distance.

events.description: enters enclosed concrete staircase ascending to elevated walkway
emerges from dark stairwell onto lit elevated platform with city view
begins descending stairs on the opposite side of the overpass

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs to an elevated walkway, crossing over, then descending the other side

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with worn steps leading upward
orange-painted metal handrails along the staircase
rough concrete walls enclosing the stairwell on both sides
illuminated vending machines visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow concrete stairwell, ascending the dimly lit steps with metal railings. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens briefly to a view of the city skyline before descending another set of stairs back to street level. Vending machines are visible at the landing area.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under overpass with vending area

events.description: exits stairs back to street level under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing illuminated vending machines

entered.detail: large yellow canopy structure of a street vendor or cafe
large illuminated advertisement billboard visible through the fog
dark entrance to a covered parking garage

segments.scene_description: Having descended the stairs, the player walks along a concrete sidewalk beneath the overpass. The area features vending machines, a yellow vendor canopy, and a large billboard glowing in the fog. The camera approaches the entrance to a covered parking garage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with concrete pillars

events.description: enters covered parking garage from street level
moving deeper into garage where fluorescent overhead lights dominate

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit parking garage passing concrete columns and safety railings

entered.detail: massive square concrete support pillars with blue markings
long fluorescent light fixtures hanging from the concrete ceiling
orange and white striped safety barriers along the ramp edges

segments.scene_description: The player enters a covered parking garage, transitioning from the foggy exterior to an enclosed concrete space. The area is lit by overhead fluorescent lights and features massive support columns, parking lines on the asphalt floor, and orange safety railings along the ramps.

events.description: exits parking garage back to foggy street level

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial sidewalk with large warehouse buildings on either side

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large industrial warehouse building with metal siding and loading docks
illuminated sign displaying the number 04 on the building facade
tall dark industrial tower with red warning lights visible in the fog

segments.scene_description: Exiting the garage, the player emerges onto an industrial street lined with warehouse buildings. A neon '04' sign glows on the left building, and a tall industrial tower looms ahead in the fog. The sidewalk is littered with debris, and a pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy urban district that transitions from open neon-lit streets into an enclosed parking structure before emerging back into an industrial zone. It begins on a hazy asphalt street illuminated by sodium lights and palm trees, moving forward past a pedestrian toward a concrete overpass. The camera then ascends a narrow concrete stairwell with metal railings, briefly revealing the city skyline at the landing before descending back to a sidewalk lined with vending machines and a glowing billboard. As the movement continues, the scene shifts from the foggy exterior into the sterile, fluorescent light of a covered parking garage characterized by massive support columns and orange safety railings. Finally, the camera exits the enclosure to emerge onto a debris-strewn industrial street, passing a glowing neon sign as a tall tower looms ahead through the mist.
